problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
hypothesis: Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization may resolve What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
